text: Do most people think of you as bizzare because you have no social skills?
Do you sometimes find yourself unable to process other people's words
Do you think your brain processes slowly compared to most people?
Do you need to be told somethings most understand on their own and they are surprised you don't?
Do you feel or are often called weird?
Do people believe you are rude or angry even when you clearly are not?
Are you a bit too honest?
Do you find things uninteresting most people enjoy?
Do you take things too literally?
Can you read between the lines?
Do you avoid crowd because it makes it difficult for you to socialize or even process your envionrment
Do you find things funny which most people find funny?
Do you sometimes feel like you can't control your body fully?
